question: Will two Republicans win in California's June 2026 gubernatorial primary?
reason: Recent polls show two Republicans leading in California's gubernatorial primary.
evidence: Steve Hilton and Chad Bianco are leading in recent polls for California's gubernatorial primary. ([latimes.com](https://www.latimes.com/california/story/2026-02-25/california-governors-race-wealth-tax-congress-ppic-poll?utm_source=openai))

The top two vote-getters in California's nonpartisan primary system advance to the general election, regardless of party affiliation. ([washingtonpost.com](https://www.washingtonpost.com/ripple/2026/03/28/california-republican-top-two-strategy/?utm_source=openai))
